---
name: time-check
description: >
  Quick time budget check. Reads docs/time-budget.md and reports
  whether the current feature is on track, over budget, or way over.
  Use at the start of each feature and when things feel slow.
---

# Time Check

When invoked:

1. Read `docs/time-budget.md`.
2. Read `docs/degradation-tiers.md`.
3. Ask which feature the developer is working on (or infer from context).
4. Report: on track, over budget (recommend next tier), or way over (recommend cut/minimal).
5. Respond with numbers. One or two sentences.
